title: 045a SIBERIA YOU ARE MY LIMIT - R/Esub
description:
TRAILER / SIBERIA YOU ARE MY LIMIT - Kazakhstan
Documentary

I love you
I love you more
I love you all the way
SIBERIA - You are my limit (Mercedes)

Stuck in the mud by heavy rains in the kazakh prairie of Siberia

- where the difference of men
makes for common strength -

camera1: Jürg Da Vaz
camera2: Irlan Saginov
cardriver: Israel
truckdriver: Ivan
edited by Sándor Gréczi
directed by Jürg Da Vaz

filmed en route from Komsomolskoje to Kostanay, Mai 2003

a handmade Da Vaz production©2003
